name: Codex review → nanobot apply
description: 代码评审 → apply 改动的两步链：codex 给出 review 报告与修改建议，nanobot 执行 patch 应用。v1 baseline 不分支、不 fan-out。

definition.name: Codex review → nanobot apply
definition.description: Two-step linear chain: codex emits review summary, nanobot applies the patch.

inputs.name: diff_or_branch
inputs.description: 目标 diff、PR URL、或 branch ref

task.prompt_template: Review {{diff_or_branch}} in repo {{repo_path}}. Identify correctness/safety issues, name concrete files, and emit a JSON report with fields {summary, suggested_patch}.
Apply the suggested patch from review step to {{repo_path}}. Patch payload: {{suggested_patch}}
